title: Data Collection Service - AkShare Extensions for Sentiment/Events/News
description: Extend AkShare utility with new data collection methods for sentiment analysis, company events, news data, and sector information. Targets 14 identified AkShare functions across 4 categories.

files.change: Add methods: get_stock_sentiment(), get_company_events(), get_stock_news(), get_sector_sentiment(), get_industry_data(), get_concept_spot()
Create DataCollectorService that orchestrates multi-source data fetching: fetch_sentiment(symbol), fetch_events(symbol, date_range), fetch_news(symbol), fetch_sector_data(board_name)
Add Pydantic schemas for: SentimentData, CompanyEvent, NewsItem, SectorData

implementation: Add to akshare_util.py: get_stock_hot_rank_em() for sentiment, stock_notice() for company announcements, stock_dividend_cninfo() for dividends, stock_repurchase_em() for buybacks, stock_profit_forecast_em() for forecasts
Add to akshare_util.py: news_baidu(), news_cctv(), news_stock() for news aggregation
Add to akshare_util.py: stock_board_industry_name_em(), stock_board_industry_spot_em(), stock_board_concept_name_em(), stock_board_concept_spot_em(), stock_industry_sw() for sector data

Create DataCollectorService in services/data_collector.py with methods: collect_sentiment(symbol), collect_events(symbol, start_date, end_date), collect_news(symbol, days), collect_sector_info(board_code)
Add Pydantic schemas in schemas/market_data.py for type-safe data structures
Write unit tests for each data collection method with mocked AkShare responses

reference.pattern: Follow existing async pattern in akshare_util.py, use pandas-to-dict conversion
reference.examples: AkShare functions: stock_hot_rank_em(), stock_notice(), news_baidu(), stock_board_industry_name_em()

criteria: 14 AkShare functions integrated covering 4 categories: sentiment (2), event (4), news (3), sector (5)
DataCollectorService provides unified interface for all data types
All methods return Pydantic-validated data structures
Unit tests: test_data_collector_sentiment, test_data_collector_events, test_data_collector_news, test_data_collector_sector

rationale.chosen_approach: Build on existing akshare_util.py pattern for consistency; create DataCollectorService for orchestration
alternatives_considered: Add directly to existing services - rejected,分散 logic makes testing harder
Create separate data collector classes - rejected, over-engineering for this scope
rationale.tradeoffs: DataCollectorService becomes a large class; can be refactored later if needed

manual_checks: Verify data formats match Pydantic schemas
Check AkShare rate limits are respected
success_metrics: All unit tests pass with 100% success rate
Data collection completes within 5 seconds per symbol

risks.description: AkShare rate limiting could cause data collection failures
risks.mitigation: Implement exponential backoff retry, cache frequently accessed data
risks.fallback: Return partial data with missing_source indicators

risks.description: Data gaps: individual stock capital flow and dragon tiger list not available via AkShare
risks.mitigation: Document as known limitations; focus on available data sources
risks.fallback: None - feature works with partial data

interfaces: DataCollectorInterface: collect_sentiment(symbol), collect_events(symbol, start, end), collect_news(symbol, days), collect_sector(board) - abstract data collection
functions: async def get_stock_sentiment(symbol: str) -> SentimentData - fetch from stock_hot_rank_em and stock_hsgt_em
async def get_company_events(symbol: str, start: date, end: date) -> list[CompanyEvent] - fetch notices, dividends, repurchases, forecasts
async def get_stock_news(symbol: str, days: int) -> list[NewsItem] - aggregate from news_baidu, news_cctv, news_stock

classes.name: DataCollectorService
classes.purpose: Orchestrates multi-source data collection from AkShare
